title: Object from Portal
result_description: A glowing Dr. Strange-style portal opens and you reach in and pull an object out of it.

inputs.name: main_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Step toward camera to grab attention, then reach toward the spot where the portal will be; an assistant holds the object out of frame so it floats.

capture_requirements.note: shot may be sideways if filmed on a DSLR — fix in edit

inputs.name: clean_plate
inputs.what_to_film: A section of the same shot before the assistant/object is in frame, to patch the hand-off.

inputs.name: portal_overlay
inputs.what_to_film: Pre-made portal stock clip on a black background (e.g. from Production Crate).

edit_steps.note: rotate the sideways DSLR footage and scale up to fill the 9:16 frame
trim to the moment with the attention-grabbing step forward
bring the portal clip in on a layer above the footage
flip/mirror the portal so it lines up with the reaching hand
Screen removes the black backdrop; Brighten is an alternative
scale and place the portal; let its built-in reveal time the opening
paste the portal on top of itself to double-up and make it brighter
add the clean-plate patch over the assistant/sign area
feathered mask hides the assistant and blends the arm fading into the portal
optional: cut out the arm so it reads as in front of the portal, then feathered mask to reveal the reaching part
add a portal SFX and mute the original clip audio (other voices)

result.description: A bright portal opens in the scene and the hand reaches through it to pull out the object.
success_criteria: Portal black backdrop fully keyed out via Screen blend
Portal aligns with the reaching hand
Arm reads as passing into/through the portal
